ast.name: setButtonText
ast.target: 重置为 AnkiConnect 默认值

ast.name: setButtonText
ast.target: 将命名空间重置为保险库 ID

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Also sync changes to the AnkiWeb “cloud” in addition to the local Anki database. This is like pressing the “Sync” button in the Anki desktop app.
ast.target: 除了本地 Anki 数据库外，还将更改同步到 AnkiWeb “云”。这就像在 Anki 桌面应用中按下“同步”按钮一样。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose when note file names should be automatically updated.
ast.target: 选择何时应自动更新笔记文件名。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the host and port to match your AnkiConnect configuration.
ast.target: 设置主机和端口以匹配您的 AnkiConnect 配置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional API security key to match your custom AnkiConnect configuration.
ast.target: 可选的 API 安全密钥，用于匹配您的自定义 AnkiConnect 配置。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Automatic Anki App launch is only supported on macOS in Node.js environment
ast.target: 自动启动 Anki 应用仅在 Node.js 环境下的 macOS 上受支持

ast.name: warn
ast.source: The autoLaunch option is only supported in a Node environment on macOS
ast.target: autoLaunch 选项仅在 macOS 的 Node 环境中受支持

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Can't connect to Anki app, retrying with auto-launch...
ast.target: 无法连接到 Anki 应用，正在尝试自动启动...

ast.name: warn
ast.target: 图片没有 src 属性

ast.name: warn
ast.source: convertFilePathsToProtocol is 'obsidian', but no obsidianVaultName provided

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 检测到 Yanki 外部设置更改

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected `>` or `->`. Expected `-->` to close comments
ast.target: 意外的 `>` 或 `->`。期望使用 `-->` 来关闭注释

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected `>`. Expected a closing `"` or `'` after the public identifier
ast.target: 意外的 `>`。期望在公共标识符后使用闭合的 `\"` 或 `'`

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected `>`. Expected a closing `"` or `'` after the identifier identifier
ast.target: 意外的 `>`。期望在标识符标识符后使用闭合的 `\"` 或 `'`

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected `%c`. Expected `[0-9]` for decimal references or `[0-9a-fA-F]` for hexadecimal references
ast.target: 意外的 `%c`。期望十进制引用使用 `[0-9]`，十六进制引用使用 `[0-9a-fA-F]`

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpectedly high character reference. Expected character references to be at most hexadecimal 10ffff (or decimal 1114111)
ast.target: 字符引用值过高。期望字符引用最大为十六进制 10ffff（或十进制 1114111）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpectedly closing tag. Expected other tags to be closed first
ast.target: 意外的闭合标签。期望其他标签先被关闭

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected control character `%x`. Expected a non-control code point, 0x00, or ASCII whitespace
ast.target: 意外的控制字符 `%x`。期望非控制码点、0x00 或 ASCII 空白字符

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpectedly control character in reference. Expected a non-control code point, 0x00, or ASCII whitespace
ast.target: 引用中出现意外的控制字符。期望非控制码点、0x00 或 ASCII 空白字符

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected text character `%c`. Only use text in `<noscript>`s in `<body>`
ast.target: 意外的文本字符 `%c`。仅在 `<body>` 中的 `<noscript>` 内使用文本

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpectedly double attribute. Expected attributes to occur only once
ast.target: 意外的重复属性。期望属性只出现一次

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected end tag. Expected no end tag or another end tag
ast.target: 意外的结束标签。应为无结束标签或另一个结束标签

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected end of file. Expected tag name instead
ast.target: 意外的文件结尾。应为标签名称

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected end of file. Expected `]]>` to close the CDATA
ast.target: 意外的文件结尾。应为 `]]>` 以关闭 CDATA

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected end of file. Expected `-->` to close the comment
ast.target: 意外的文件结尾。应为 `-->` 以关闭注释

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected end of file. Expected a valid doctype (such as `<!doctype html>`)
ast.target: 意外的文件结尾。应为有效的文档类型（如 `<!doctype html>`）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected end of file. Expected text or a closing tag
ast.target: 意外的文件结尾。应为文本或关闭标签

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected end of file. Expected `>` to close the tag
ast.target: 意外的文件结尾。应为 `>` 以关闭标签

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected `%c-1`. Expected `-->` to close the comment
ast.target: 意外的 `%c-1`。应为 `-->` 以关闭注释

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected `%c`. Expected `<!--` to open the comment
ast.target: 意外的 `%c`。应为 `<!--` 以打开注释

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected `%c`. Expected an ASCII letter instead
ast.target: 意外的 `%c`。应为 ASCII 字母

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected doctype. Expected doctype before head
ast.target: 意外的文档类型。文档类型应位于 head 之前

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected start tag `<head>`. Expected `<head>` directly after doctype
ast.target: 意外的开始标签 `<head>`。`<head>` 应直接位于文档类型之后

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected `%c-1`. Expected an attribute value or no `%c-1` instead
ast.target: 意外的 `%c-1`。应为属性值或无 `%c-1`

ast.name: description
ast.source: Expected a `<!doctype html>` before anything else
ast.target: 在任何其他内容之前应为 `<!doctype html>`

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected doctype end at `%c`. Expected `html` instead
ast.target: 意外的文档类型结束于 `%c`。应为 `html`

ast.name: description
ast.target: 意外的 `%c`。应为 `public` 的标识符

ast.name: description
ast.target: 意外的 `%c`。应为 ASCII 空白字符

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected code point. Do not use noncharacters in HTML
ast.target: 意外的码点。请勿在 HTML 中使用非字符

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected code point `%x`. Do not use noncharacters in HTML
ast.target: 意外的码点 `%x`。请勿在 HTML 中使用非字符

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected code point. Do not use NULL characters in HTML
ast.target: 意外的码点。请勿在 HTML 中使用 NULL 字符

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected end of file. Expected closing tag instead
ast.target: 意外的文件结尾。应为关闭标签

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected code point. Do not use lone surrogate characters in HTML
ast.target: 意外的码点。请勿在 HTML 中使用孤立代理字符

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected code point `%x`. Do not use lone surrogate characters in HTML
ast.target: 意外的码点 `%x`。请勿在 HTML 中使用孤立代理字符

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected `%c`. Expected whitespace, `/`, `>`, `=`, or probably an ASCII letter
ast.target: 意外的 `%c`。应为空白、`/`、`>`、`=` 或可能为 ASCII 字母

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected `%c`. Quote the attribute value to include it
ast.target: 意外的 `%c`。请引用属性值以包含它

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected `%c`. Add an attribute name before it
ast.target: 意外的 `%c`。请在其前添加属性名称

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected code point `%x`. Do not use NULL characters in HTML
ast.target: 意外的码点 `%x`。请勿在 HTML 中使用 NULL 字符

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected `%c-1`. Expected it followed by `>` or in a quoted attribute value
ast.target: 意外的 `%c-1`。应为其后跟 `>` 或在带引号的属性值中

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected character reference. Expected known named character references
ast.target: 意外的字符引用。应为已知的命名字符引用

ast.name: message
ast.source: Unexpected block-seq-ind on same line with key
ast.target: 意外的块序列指示符与键在同一行

ast.name: name
ast.target: 同步抽认卡笔记到 Anki
